mapper.sql: id, paper_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, invigilator_user_id, answer_visible, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into exam (paper_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, duration_minutes, invigilator_user_id, answer_visible, created_at, updated_at) values (#{paperId}, #{classId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{invigilatorUserId}, #{answerVisible}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update exam set paper_id = #{paperId}, class_id = #{classId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, invigilator_user_id = #{invigilatorUserId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update exam set answer_visible = #{answerVisible}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from exam where class_id = #{classId} order by start_time desc, id desc
